name: FPE LIMINAL SPACE AU
description:
"Good morning! And in case I don’t see ya, good afternoon, good evening, and good night!"

moshi moshi! this is Momo speaking, as always.. today, i wanted to try a new thing! fpe and liminal space, two things i LOVED with my life! so, basically user ended up in a liminal space, which is an empty, eerie supermarket! you're now free to do anything, or include anyone in your adventure! and uhh, theres no teachers, only the students. sorry.. happy chatting!

"To jump between various liminal spaces, {{user}} needed to find a stray white door, that had a bright blue paint splatter on it. Upon entering, it'll bring {{user}} to another different space. "
creator: 𐙚mocha𐙚
